title: Velvet Bite Packaging Proposal Board AI
sourceTitle: Velvet Bite Packaging Proposal Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cohesive three-panel luxury chocolate campaign for Velvet Bite, built around three premium square product ads for a fictional luxury chocolate brand named Velvet Bite and Blood Orange Noir with warm orange drama, Salted Pistachio Muse with cream and green refinement, and Raspberry Ember with deep crimson indulgence. Subject: Velvet Bite appears as the consistent brand identity across all three square product ads. three premium square product ads for a fictional luxury chocolate brand named Velvet Bite is presented through matte black chocolate bar wrappers, gold foil accents, elegant serif typography, hero bar packaging, foil label detail, and premium product-box styling, with each chocolate bar staged as the hero product. Scene: Blood Orange Noir with warm orange drama, Salted Pistachio Muse with cream and green refinement, and Raspberry Ember with deep crimson indulgence creates three distinct flavor atmospheres while every panel stays within one premium brand system. Composition: Fixed 3-ad square campaign set: three premium square product ads arranged as a cohesive series, each with a dark chocolate bar hero, flavor-matched ingredients, bold headline, short supporting copy, and the same refined brand packaging language. Signature Elements: Blood Orange Noir with warm orange drama, Salted Pistachio Muse with cream and green refinement, and Raspberry Ember with deep crimson indulgence defines the source campaign logic: one luxury chocolate brand, three distinct square ads, cohesive packaging, and flavor-matched props. Style: Premium editorial product photography with matte black wrapper design, gold foil accents, elegant serif typography, realistic chocolate texture, high-end prop styling, and polished luxury confectionery advertising finish. Color Palette: Fixed brand system of matte black, rich dark chocolate brown, gold foil, cream neutrals, plus flavor-specific orange, green, or crimson accents that differentiate each ad without breaking cohesion. Lighting: High-end product-ad lighting with controlled shadows, glossy chocolate highlights, soft ingredient texture, gold foil shimmer, and clear wrapper readability. Camera: Square commercial product-ad framing with strong hero-product hierarchy, crisp packaging detail, editorial prop depth, and consistent crop rhythm across all three panels. Materials: Dark chocolate bars, matte wrappers, gold foil, serif label print, citrus, pistachio, raspberry, cream backgrounds, and premium box or foil details remain tactile. Typography: Use bold flavor headlines, short supporting copy, readable Velvet Bite packaging text, and the CTA "Shop the drop." in each ad with intentional hierarchy. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cohesive three-panel luxury chocolate campaign for VELVET BITE, built around three premium square product ads for a luxury dark-chocolate bar campaign and Midnight Yuzu with black citrus glow, Almond Smoke with warm cream and bronze nuts, and Cherry Ember with deep crimson fruit mood. Subject: VELVET BITE appears as the consistent brand identity across all three square product ads. three premium square product ads for a luxury dark-chocolate bar campaign is presented through matte black chocolate bar wrappers, gold foil accents, elegant serif typography, hero bar packaging, foil label detail, and premium product-box styling, with each chocolate bar staged as the hero product. Scene: Midnight Yuzu with black citrus glow, Almond Smoke with warm cream and bronze nuts, and Cherry Ember with deep crimson fruit mood creates three distinct flavor atmospheres while every panel stays within one premium brand system. Composition: Fixed 3-ad square campaign set: three premium square product ads arranged as a cohesive series, each with a dark chocolate bar hero, flavor-matched ingredients, bold headline, short supporting copy, and the same refined brand packaging language. Signature Elements: Midnight Yuzu with black citrus glow, Almond Smoke with warm cream and bronze nuts, and Cherry Ember with deep crimson fruit mood defines the source campaign logic: one luxury chocolate brand, three distinct square ads, cohesive packaging, and flavor-matched props. Style: Premium editorial product photography with matte black wrapper design, gold foil accents, elegant serif typography, realistic chocolate texture, high-end prop styling, and polished luxury confectionery advertising finish. Color Palette: Fixed brand system of matte black, rich dark chocolate brown, gold foil, cream neutrals, plus flavor-specific orange, green, or crimson accents that differentiate each ad without breaking cohesion. Lighting: High-end product-ad lighting with controlled shadows, glossy chocolate highlights, soft ingredient texture, gold foil shimmer, and clear wrapper readability. Camera: Square commercial product-ad framing with strong hero-product hierarchy, crisp packaging detail, editorial prop depth, and consistent crop rhythm across all three panels. Materials: Dark chocolate bars, matte wrappers, gold foil, serif label print, citrus, pistachio, raspberry, cream backgrounds, and premium box or foil details remain tactile. Typography: Use bold flavor headlines, short supporting copy, readable VELVET BITE packaging text, and the CTA "Shop the drop." in each ad with intentional hierarchy. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

Theme: Cohesive three-panel luxury chocolate campaign for VELVET BITE, built around three premium square product ads for a luxury dark-chocolate bar campaign and Midnight Yuzu with black citrus glow, Almond Smoke with warm cream and bronze nuts, and Cherry Ember with deep crimson fruit mood. Subject: VELVET BITE appears as the consistent brand identity across all three square product ads. three premium square product ads for a luxury dark-chocolate bar campaign is presented through matte black chocolate bar wrappers, gold foil accents, elegant serif typography, hero bar packaging, foil label detail, and premium product-box styling, with each chocolate bar staged as the hero product. Scene: Midnight Yuzu with black citrus glow, Almond Smoke with warm cream and bronze nuts, and Cherry Ember with deep crimson fruit mood creates three distinct flavor atmospheres while every panel stays within one premium brand system. Composition: Fixed 3-ad square campaign set: three premium square product ads arranged as a cohesive series, each with a dark chocolate bar hero, flavor-matched ingredients, bold headline, short supporting copy, and the same refined brand packaging language. Signature Elements: Midnight Yuzu with black citrus glow, Almond Smoke with warm cream and bronze nuts, and Cherry Ember with deep crimson fruit mood defines the source campaign logic: one luxury chocolate brand, three distinct square ads, cohesive packaging, and flavor-matched props. Style: Premium editorial product photography with matte black wrapper design, gold foil accents, elegant serif typography, realistic chocolate texture, high-end prop styling, and polished luxury confectionery advertising finish. Color Palette: Fixed brand system of matte black, rich dark chocolate brown, gold foil, cream neutrals, plus flavor-specific orange, green, or crimson accents that differentiate each ad without breaking cohesion. Lighting: High-end product-ad lighting with controlled shadows, glossy chocolate highlights, soft ingredient texture, gold foil shimmer, and clear wrapper readability. Camera: Square commercial product-ad framing with strong hero-product hierarchy, crisp packaging detail, editorial prop depth, and consistent crop rhythm across all three panels. Materials: Dark chocolate bars, matte wrappers, gold foil, serif label print, citrus, pistachio, raspberry, cream backgrounds, and premium box or foil details remain tactile. Typography: Use bold flavor headlines, short supporting copy, readable VELVET BITE packaging text, and the CTA "Shop the drop." in each ad with intentional hierarchy. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
